normalization.notes: Store Baybayin text in NFC and preserve source strings for audit. Keep dependent vowel signs and virama or pamudpod choices explicit because historic and modern practices differ.

segmentation.pedagogical_units: base syllable letters, i/e mark, u/o mark, virama or pamudpod policy, and syllable chunks
segmentation.notes: Baybayin represents open syllables naturally and final consonants are a pedagogical policy decision. Keep modern final-consonant notation reviewable before shipping content.
